title: calyptrochilum aurantiacum
intro: Calyptrochilum aurantiacum, also known as the yellow-berried orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Calyptrochilum aurantiacum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
